title: shonia tristigma subsp. tristigma
intro: Shonia tristigma subsp. tristigma, also known as the Red Stinkwood, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Shonia tristigma subsp. tristigma include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and roots are typically used to make decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
